_README: Hand-curated interprofession / syndicat websites per appellation. Resolution order: by_slug[slug] → by_slug[parent_slug] → by_bassin[region]. `label` is shown verbatim (proper noun, not translated). Add freely; no code change required. URLs are probed before commit — broken entries are removed rather than left rotting.
